## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Routable for SEO and content strategy services.](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end SEO and content creation services, combining AI tools with expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Routable is considering GrowthX's services for Q1 2024, focusing on content refresh and unique perspective development](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach includes strategy sprints, content roadmaps, and AI-powered workflows for research and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Routable team to discuss internally and follow up on priorities and potential partnership timing](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Service Overview

  - [End-to-end partner for SEO, GEO strategy, content creation, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Focus on driving higher-intent organic traffic and monitoring AI search performance](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Two-phase approach: 8-week strategy sprint followed by 12-month engagement](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Team includes managing director, managing editor, and content manager](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Use of sophisticated AI workflows for research and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Emphasis on maintaining quality while scaling content production](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)

### GrowthX Platform and Workflow

  - [Proprietary platform used internally, moving towards client access](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Features include content roadmap, artifacts storage, and AI-powered content generation pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
  - [Utilizes multiple AI tools (OpenAI, Claude, Perplexity) for deep research and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [Iterative process to ensure high-quality, factually accurate content](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
  - [Capability to create programmatic content at scale (e.g., Ramp's tool spend data pages)](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

### Routable's Current Situation and Needs

  - [Natalie Hayes recently joined as Director of DemandGen](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Current SEO efforts exist but lack muscle for adapting to changes and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [Interest in refreshing existing content and developing unique perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Potential Q1 2024 start, with initial focus on content refresh](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)

### Partnership Considerations

  - [GrowthX could replace existing SEO agency if not creating content](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Potential to eliminate need for certain AI search analytics tools](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [GrowthX acts as an extension of the content team, including CMS staging and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Routable team to discuss internally about priorities and partnership fit](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Routable team (Omri, Nicole, Natalie) to meet early next week to discuss priorities and fit](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [GrowthX to send email summary of the meeting discussion](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [Routable to follow up with questions after internal review](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
  - [Both parties to maintain transparency about decision timeline and potential Q1 2024 start](https://fathom.video/share/CbcjLwvz27F7n_TjG6jNeZ57mLkDJjvA?tab=summary&timestamp=1901.0)
